title: Prologis: What Derailed The Exceptional Returns
text: When we last covered Prologis, we highlighted why the stock was soaring and what could break it down. Despite flying higher from that point, the risk did play out and the stock is 17% lower than what it was 15 months ago.

title: Prologis (PLD) and Duke Realty Inch Closer to Merger
text: The merger will result in the addition of high-quality properties to the Prologis' (PLD) portfolio in major regions across the nation, including Southern California, New Jersey, South Florida, Chicago, Dallas and Atlanta.

title: Prologis' $26B acquisition of Duke Realty approved by shareholders
text: Prologis announced Wednesday after the market closed that shareholders approved the proposed $26 billion all-stock acquisition of Duke Realty. In separate votes both held Wednesday, 87% of Prologis shareholders and 85% of Duke Realty shareholders agreed to the terms of the merger.

title: The Bear Market Is Making These Top Dividend Stocks Look Really Attractive
text: Falling stock prices are pushing up dividend yields.

title: Prologis to Announce Third Quarter 2022 Results October 19
text: SAN FRANCISCO, Sept. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Prologis, Inc. (NYSE: PLD), the global leader in logistics real estate, will host a webcast and conference call with senior management to discuss third quarter results, current market conditions and future outlook on Wednesday, October 19, 2022, at 9:00 a.m.

title: PG&E and EQT Set to Join S&P 500; ExlService to Join S&P MidCap 400; Others to Join S&P SmallCap 600
text: NEW YORK , Sept. 23, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- S&P Dow Jones Indices will make the following changes to the S&P 500, S&P MidCap 400 and S&P SmallCap 600: PG&E Corp. (NYSE: PCG) will replace Citrix Systems Inc. (NASD: CTXS) in the S&P 500 effective prior to the opening of trading on Monday, October 3.
